name: Nigel Farage
description: Founder of UKIP, architect of Brexit, and leader of Reform UK. The most influential British politician never to hold cabinet office.

name: Richard Tice
description: Co-founder of Leave.EU and chairman of Reform UK. Property developer turned politician.

name: Suella Braverman
description: Former Conservative Home Secretary who defected to Reform UK in January 2026.

name: Lee Anderson
description: Former Labour and Conservative MP who defected to Reform UK in 2024.

name: Rupert Lowe
description: Former Southampton FC chairman, elected as Reform UK MP in 2024.

name: Ann Widdecombe
description: Former Conservative cabinet minister who joined the Brexit Party in 2019.

name: Arron Banks
description: Businessman and major donor who co-founded Leave.EU with Farage.
